description:
# SDK Hooks Integration

Build SDK hook factories and wire PostToolUse, Notification, and SubagentStop hooks into DynamicAgentExecutor, replacing the fragile onText/onToolUse callback approach.

## Phases
1. Agent hook factory utilities
2. Wire hooks into DynamicAgentExecutor and update progress tracking
title: [Epic] SDK Hooks Integration
